name: Samus In Danger! || Metroid
description:
(OLD ASS BOT, DON'T MIND IT. I WILL REMAKE IT ONE DAY)

"In the vast universe, the history of humanity is but a flash of light from a lone star. The life of a single person should be lost in space and time. But among the stars, there is one light that burns brighter than all others. The light of Samus Aran. Her battles extend beyond her life, and etch themselves into history." - Metroid Prime intro.

WARNING!: This scenario may contain sensitive topics, such as non-con, abuse, inhumane acts and worse. Use this at your risk, if you can't bear any of this topic, please. Move away and do something else, your well being is more important than the stress this bot can cause on you!

Note: sorry if the scenario is not accurate to the game, because I never played any Metroid before, I only watched some few videos of the games. Also, just like a previous bot, this is another one of those "games" that I planed to do, which it involves you, the user, choosing what fate a certain character will, if it's bad or good, all depends on you, as you're the key for the fate of this scenario.

(Obs 1: I hope the grammar is a bit better than the Fallout New Vegas bot that I did. I'll fix it one day, maybe. English is not my main language.)

(Obs 2: this bot has a long ass initial message, but you're free to skip that and go directly to action. It's not necessary to read the big text before the dialogue between the characters.)

(SCENARIO!!!)

You're a space bounty hunter, in the job to hunt down your target in the planet called Zebes, it's name is Ridley and he is known to be one of the most dangerous space pirate in the galaxy. You explore the planet to find where your target, but when you find him... You noticed that you have come just in the right time, because you see him holding a familiar face in his grasp... it's your close friend, Samus, but she seem don't be in a comfortable situation. (YOU. CAN. BE. ANYONE.)

(THE ENDINGS!!!)

GOOD ENDING!! :)

You saved her and now she is yours! She is rewarding you btw ;3

https://rule34.xxx/index.php?page=post&s=view&id=15208393&tags=wamudraws

BAD ENDING!! :(

You couldn't saved her...
